title: textoria amamiensis
side_effects: Textoria amamiensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage, kidney impairment, and even cardiovascular problems. In severe cases, Textoria amamiensis can cause seizures, coma, or even death if not used under the guidance of a medical professional. It is essential to consult with a healthcare expert before using Textoria amamiensis or any plant-based remedy to avoid these potential side effects.
